title: 📉 Fractional Calculus
name: Fractional Calculus
what_it_is: Math that generalizes derivatives and integrals to *fractional orders*—used in modeling memory, time fuzz, and anomalous diffusion.
how_to_use: her aura glows with fractional memory—every movement carries lingering echo
her skin resists pure form—fractional derivatives turn her edges into smeared light
animation_behavior: Motion lags behind itself, time feels elastic, feedback loops persist longer than expected ---
